description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a rich orange skin and a long, slightly curved, dark green stem. The surface of the pumpkin is marked by shallow vertical ridges and subtle natural blemishes, giving it a realistic, organic appearance. The stem is robust, textured, and tapers to a point, showing some natural twists and color variation from green to brown. The pumpkin's body is plump and symmetrical, with a slightly flattened base that allows it to sit upright. There are no visible carvings, cutouts, or decorative accessories on its surface. The overall look is that of a fresh, uncarved pumpkin, suitable for autumnal or Halloween urban displays.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a long, textured green stem and natural surface ridges. The pumpkin is uncarved and has a realistic, organic appearance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full roundness of the pumpkin and the central placement of the long, dark green stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and curve of the stem, as well as the smooth, slightly ridged orange surface.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical, plump body of the pumpkin and the upright stem.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the stem's twist and the subtle surface blemishes on the pumpkin's skin.
